## What

Briefly describe what this PR does.

## Why

What problem does this solve, and why this approach?

## Phase

Which phase does this belong to? (See `docs/CURRENT_PHASE.md`)

- [ ] This work is in scope for the active phase

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Migration added (if schema changed)
- [ ] No secrets in code or commit history
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff

(For UI changes)

## Notes for reviewer

Anything specific to look at, or trade-offs you made?
